note: Inventory derived from the product's module registry (compliance.compliance_modules). Each module is a seeded template library of obligations, controls and tasks that customers review and adapt — not automated monitoring, data-logging or screening. People do the compliance work; the tool keeps the record.

modules.name: Health & Safety
legislation: Health and Safety at Work Act 2015 (NZ)
modules.description: Framework and task templates for workplace health and safety obligations.

modules.name: Employment & HR
modules.description: Templates covering employment agreements, leave, termination procedures, record-keeping and good faith obligations.

modules.name: Privacy & Cybersecurity
modules.description: NZ Privacy Act 2020 obligations register: IPP self-assessment templates, breach-response checklist, security controls register, policy library.

modules.name: Privacy & GDPR
modules.description: Data protection framework templates covering consent, breach response and data subject request obligations.

modules.name: Food Safety
modules.description: HACCP-based food safety checklist and documentation templates.

modules.name: Body Corporate
modules.description: Task and documentation templates for body corporate governance obligations.

modules.name: Maritime
modules.description: Maritime safety documentation and checklist templates.

removed.name: Financial AML
removed.reason: Withdrawn. AML/CFT capability (transaction monitoring, sanctions/PEP screening, SAR/STR filing) is not offered by Modular Compliance.
